##NAMES=Schaurteite
##RRUFFID=R120054
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_3_Ge(SO_4_)_2_(OH)_6_·3H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Tsumeb, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Massive aggregate of parallel and radiating colorless needles intermixed with calcite, associated with tennantite and renierite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120054
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.522 b: 8.522 c: 10.796 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 679.1 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
